title: Hypothesis
description: A testable belief to be validated by an experiment or POC before committing to a path. IDs follow the HYP- scheme.

statement.description: The hypothesis, phrased so it can be confirmed or refuted (e.g. 'X will sustain N req/s at < M ms').

rationale.description: Why this is worth testing / what decision it informs.

validation_method.description: How the hypothesis will be tested (high level; the detailed plan is an EXP-/POC-).

source.description: Provenance: input section or derived stage.

status.description: Hypothesis lifecycle. Confirmed/Refuted are terminal outcomes after experimentation.
